criteria_results.title: Allegation 1: Cherry-Picking Trade Allocations â€” Identified
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output clearly identifies cherry-picking/favorable trade allocation as a distinct allegation category. Multiple sections explicitly describe the pattern of disproportionately allocating profitable trades to Oceanic Fund I LP and Chao's personal account. The 'Directed Brokerage Scheme' section quotes directly from the enforcement referral about Chao receiving 'an outsized share of profitable trade allocations in her personal account' and facilitating 'favoritism shown to Oceanic Fund I LP.' The 'Harm to other advisory clients' section notes Oceanic Fund I LP received 68.4% profitable allocations. The 'Affiliation with Whitmore GP Holdings LLC' section references 'Allegation Category 1 (Cherry-Picking Trade Allocations)' explicitly. The 'Conflict of interest' section and 'Dual role responsibility' section also reference cherry-picking as a distinct allegation category. The output thoroughly describes the pattern of disproportionate allocation of profitable trades to Oceanic Fund I LP and Chao's personal account.

criteria_results.title: Cherry-Picking: Correct Statutory Provisions Cited
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output explicitly cites Sections 206(1) and 206(2) of the Investment Advisers Act in connection with cherry-picking and related allegations. In the 'Breach of Fiduciary Duty / Directed Brokerage Arrangement' section, it states 'the SEC alleges that WCA violated Section 206(1) of the Advisers Act through "Cherry-Picking Trade Allocations".' In the 'Harm to other advisory clients' section, it references 'violations of both Section 206(1) of the Advisers Act, which prohibits any investment adviser from employing any device, scheme, or artifice to defraud any client or prospective client (such as cherry-picking trade allocations...).' The directed brokerage section also cites 'Sections 206(1) and 206(2) of the Advisers Act' in connection with fraudulent conduct. These citations satisfy the criterion.
